htmlMain:
Welcome to the Raleigh Hills Business Association.

The mission of the Raleigh Hills Business Association is to support the community of Raleigh Hills;

to promote a vibrant business environment, maintain a safe & healthy climate,

create community consciousness & maximize livability.

What Does My RHBA Membership Give Me?

  • Your business listed in our online directory with back links to your website.
  • At least two monthly networking events with other business professionals in our community.
  • A Vote at the RHBA Annual Business Meeting.
  • Opportunities to connect with your community on a deeper level, including charitable, social service, municipal organizations.
  • Participation and promotion of your business in RHBA sponsored activities and to the RHBA Community.
  • A chance to present your business to the community and through networking.
  • Ability to share your skills through assistance at the Shred Event, Shop With A Cop Program, Backpack Program, and other events we participate in.
  • Promotion of Open Houses and other Public Events your business may Sponsor.
  • Know of and support other Raleigh Hills business owners, schools, county agencies and non profit entities.
  • Be a part of a larger community of people working to make the area of Raleigh Hills and surrounding communities better.

CONTACT US      info@RaleighHillsBusinessAssn.org
